allow: PowerShell($body = '{"repo": "psf/requests", "pr_number": 6710}'; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/review" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Host "Keys: $\(\($resp | Get-Member -MemberType NoteProperty\).Name -join ', '\)"; Write-Host "---security \(first 120 chars\)---"; Write-Host \($resp.security_findings.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120, $resp.security_findings.Length\)\)\); Write-Host "---verdict \(first 200 chars\)---"; Write-Host \($resp.final_verdict.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $resp.final_verdict.Length\)\)\))
